issues.title: All behavioral story points render '404' as h1 — content missing
issues.details: Every story point URL (/spaces/1AqFwKSf59FiIrqzaQ7i/story/*) shows h1='404'. Content body has only ~21 words. Story point viewer renders a 404 error page instead of the actual content. This affects all 12 story points. Root cause: likely same React Hooks violation as System Design space (useState after conditional return in SpaceViewerPage.tsx or StoryPointViewerPage.tsx).

issues.title: Behavioral Interview space not visible in /spaces list
issues.details: Student navigated to /spaces and 'Behavioral Interview Mastery' card was not found. This may be a class enrollment issue (student not enrolled in cls_g10_behavioral_a) or the space card not being rendered. The space IS accessible via direct URL.

issues.title: Space viewer (/spaces/SPACE_ID) fails to render — h1 not visible
issues.details: Direct navigation to http://localhost:4570/spaces/1AqFwKSf59FiIrqzaQ7i shows no h1. Consistent with known SpaceViewerPage.tsx React hooks violation (useState after early return). Fix: move celebrationShown useState before conditional returns in SpaceViewerPage.tsx.

issues.title: No writing textarea found in behavioral practice story points
issues.details: Cross-Functional, Failure & Growth, Ambiguity story points show no textarea for behavioral answer composition. This is critical for behavioral interview prep — students need to write STAR answers. Likely because content items are rendering 404 instead of actual practice questions.

issues.title: Zero STAR keywords detected in story point content
issues.details: STAR Method page shows only 21 words and 0/8 STAR keywords (situation, task, action, result, story, framework, behavioral). Content not rendering — only 404 error text visible.

issues.title: FAANG Prep story point shows no company-specific content
issues.details: Company-Specific FAANG Preparation page contains 0/8 expected FAANG keywords (google, amazon, meta, microsoft, apple, leadership principle, lp, culture). Content is a 404 error page.

issues.title: No model STAR answers or template guidance found
issues.details: Mock Interview practice and STAR Method pages contain no model answers, sample STAR stories, or template guidance. Expected example-driven learning content for behavioral prep.

issues.title: AI evaluation of behavioral answers not detectable
issues.details: No AI evaluation feedback UI found. Cannot test AI scoring of STAR answers because practice questions don't render (404 content). Once content rendering is fixed, AI evaluation should be re-tested.

issues.title: Behavioral quiz shows no MCQ or paragraph questions
issues.details: Quiz story point (jIPacoKFRykWJ3mtQ8Cs) rendered as 404. No MCQ radio buttons or textarea paragraph questions found. 8 quiz items exist in seed data but are not rendering.

issues.title: Timed assessment shows no timer, no STAR story prompts
issues.details: Timed assessment (xBnumc8jTQje26POV6Lq) renders as 404. No timer visible, no Start button found, no writing prompts for 3 STAR stories under time pressure. All 8 timed items in seed data not rendering.

issues.title: Breadcrumbs not visible on story point viewer pages
issues.details: No breadcrumb navigation found on story point pages. Students cannot easily navigate back to space or spaces list from a story point.

issues.title: Auth state reuse failed for one test — login timeout on retry
issues.details: P1 (Cross-Functional Collaboration) test timed out at 120s because saved auth state was stale and fresh login attempt timed out. Auth state caching pattern needs improvement.

learningEffectiveness.notes: Login works. Direct URL navigation to all 12 story points works (routes registered). However, ALL story points render 404 error pages — zero content is accessible. A student cannot learn STAR Method, Leadership, Conflict Resolution, or any behavioral topic from this space. Writing textarea for STAR answer practice not found. AI evaluation not testable. Quiz and timed assessment both broken. Primary blocker is the StoryPointViewer/SpaceViewer content rendering bug. Fix the React hooks violation and re-test.

prioritizedFixes.fix: Fix StoryPointViewer content rendering — investigate 404 in /spaces/1AqFwKSf59FiIrqzaQ7i/story/* URLs
prioritizedFixes.impact: Unblocks all 12 story points and all content assessment

prioritizedFixes.fix: Fix SpaceViewerPage React hooks violation (useState after early return) — same fix as System Design space
Enroll student (vmP1QTDZBRCqE3Mr6IPK) in cls_g10_behavioral_a class or check space enrollment
prioritizedFixes.impact: Enables Behavioral Interview Mastery card to appear in /spaces list

prioritizedFixes.fix: Add textarea/writing input support in behavioral practice story points
